essence: Lays paving, kerbs, and hard landscaping elements for roads, paths, and public spaces.

identity.title: Paving Operative
identity.summary: Prepares surfaces, lays paving materials, and finishes hard landscaping works to specification and safety standards.

salary.notes: Specialist stonework or heritage paving can attract higher pay.

qualifications: Experience in paving, kerbing, or landscaping
Ability to work with hand and power tools
Understanding of levels, drainage, and materials
Good physical fitness and teamwork skills

lifestyle.description: Outdoor, physical work often seasonal; project‑based with early starts and teamwork on site.
